calendar.matters:
Petition For Interpretation And Instructions Regarding Trust Provisions, To Approve Termination Of Trust, And To Ascertain Beneficiaries
Off Calendar Mar-24-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Virginia Palmer for Fidelity Personal Trust Company.

Ms. Palmer stated that notice of the new development was provided to the Beneficiaries on January 20, 2011. The Court granted the Petition for Interpretation and Instructions Regarding Trust Provisions (subject to review of the order).

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

Petition For Interpretation And Instructions Regarding Trust Provisions, To Approve Termination Of Trust, And To Ascertain Beneficiaries
Off Calendar Feb-16-2011 Continued To Mar-22-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Virginia Palmer for Fidelity Trust (Petitioner). George Smith (Beneficiary) in Propria Persona.

Ms. Palmer stated that she filed consents from all Beneficiaries except for one, that the drafting Attorney found the second page of the August 20, 2007 amendment, that there was no delivery to the Trustee and that the amendment was signed by Ms. Ailes as Trustee at a time that she was not Trustee. The Court stated that it was appropriate to notify the Beneficiaries of the new developement and that further consents were needed. The matter was continued to March 22, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.
